Name: Frequency of 'Accepted + In Progress' appearing more than once in the same case

Metric: Number of 'Accepted + In Progress' activities for cases where activity 'Completed + In Call' occurs

Name: Percentage of 'Accepted + In Progress' activities that are part of high-frequency short-duration variants ending in 'Completed + In Call'
